hero.headline: I don't return undefined.
hero.desc: I build production-ready software from scratch. System design, backend, mobile, all the way to deployment.

about.title: About Me
about.headline: I architect systems where reliability is the baseline.
about.desc: I handle the full development process. From planning and system design to writing code and shipping to production. I enjoy solving hard problems and building software that's reliable and easy to maintain long-term.

contact.headline: Let's engineer solutions together.
contact.desc: Got an idea that needs building? Send me the details below. I'm always open to interesting projects and new collaborations.

hireBanner.headline: Need an Architect to Scale Your Vision?
hireBanner.desc: Experienced in building web apps, mobile apps, and backend systems that scale. Let me know if you need a developer for your next project.
